title: Intense Roasted Japanese Vegetables Skillet
description: A kid-friendly Japanese dish featuring roasted vegetables cooked in a ttukbaegi earthenware skillet, low in carbs and rich in flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together sesame oil, soy sauce, rice vinegar, salt, and black pepper.
Add the sliced eggplant, mushrooms, carrots, and red bell pepper to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade.
Heat a large ttukbaegi earthenware skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the marinated vegetables to the skillet and cook for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes, stirring every 5 minutes.
Remove the skillet from the oven and stir in any accumulated juices.
Return the skillet to the stovetop over medium heat and cook for an additional 5 minutes, stirring frequently.
Serve the roasted vegetables hot, garnished with sliced green onions and sesame seeds if desired.
